ops.title: Shipped ask_user_question detector: cc-transcript v8.1.0 tagged+pushed (detector rebased onto v8 after discovering main had moved 7.0.1->8.0.0 with 4 breaking refactors; 8.0.0 was released by maintainer mid-session so detector went out as 8.1.0). Full parity: 1169 cc-transcript pytest + 26 cargo + great-docs + ty clean. cc-pushback migrated to 8.x (meta_of->event_meta, JudgeError in tests) + question_answer wiring active: 193 pytest, e2e yields 4 candidates with resolved picked_labels. Awaiting PyPI 8.1.0 to finalize cc-pushback pin + rescan.
